data.title: Completion of first community-funded home in Greenville, CA celebrated with ribbon-cutting ceremony on September 24, 2025.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, Paradise Affordable Homes and RRA Builders celebrated the completion of the inaugural community-funded, single-family residence in Greenville, CA. The ribbon cutting ceremony and open house marked this milestone achievement. This initiative aimed to provide affordable housing solutions in the area.

data.title: Prime Mining receives favorable recommendation from Glass Lewis for plan of arrangement with Torex Gold; Securityholders reminded of voting deadline. TSX: PRYM, OTCQX: PRMNF, Frankfurt: O4V3.
data.description: Vancouver, BC - On September 18, 2025, Prime Mining Corp. ("Prime" or "the Company") (TSX: PRYM) (OTCQX: PRMNF) (Frankfurt: O4V3) shared that Glass Lewis, a reputable proxy advisory firm, endorsed the approval of the plan of arrangement (the "Arrangement") with Torex Gold Resources Inc. This recommendation is directed towards Prime Securityholders and advocates voting "FOR" the proposed agreement.

data.title: Learn about the future of the internet with 'web3 by a16z' podcast, unraveling Web3's potential with industry experts.
data.description: The podcast titled 'web3 with a16z' delves into the impactful possibilities of Web3, featuring perspectives from prominent individuals within the industry regarding how this emerging era of the internet enables individuals to take ownership of digital content.Listeners can gain valuable insights on the subject through this podcast.

data.title: London Stock Exchange introduces new Bitcoin staking ETP, offering opportunities to earn yield on BTC holdings. #crypto #finance
data.description: Although generating yield from Bitcoin holdings remains relatively new, individuals can explore options for doing so through centralized lending platforms and networks associated with Bitcoin.

data.title: Cenovus Energy highlights MEG transaction benefits, approved by MEG board, providing superior value for shareholders.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on September 18, 2025, Cenovus Energy Inc. (TSX: CVE) (NYSE: CVE) announced the release of a presentation regarding its transaction with MEG Energy. The transaction received unanimous approval from MEG Energy’s board of directors and was emphasized as offering complete and equitable value to MEG shareholders. In comparison, Strathcona Resources’ offer was labeled as substandard, presenting high risks and considered not advantageous for MEG shareholders.

data.title: PA Health & Wellness, part of Centene Corp, recognized as top 14 Medicaid health plan in US.
data.description: A Pennsylvania-based managed care organization, PA Health & Wellness, a subsidiary of Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC), was recently recognized as one of the top 14 Medicaid health plans in the U.S. The rankings were revealed on September 18, 2025, in Mechanicsburg, Pennsylvania. This acknowledgment highlights the company's strong performance and commitment to providing quality healthcare services.
